#2443 — language-aware session title

CC 2.1.176 localizes native session titles to the language setting. ork's haiku rename prompt was hardcoded English; now it injects a language line for non-English. Pick a language and prompt to see the generated haiku prompt (the injected line is highlighted).


  
Default en (or absent setting) injects nothing — existing behavior preserved.
  Read path: readEffectiveLanguage(projectDir) → project .claude/settings.json,
  then $HOME, else en. Source: src/hooks/src/lib/session-identity.ts.
